items.name: Shattered Voidstone Amulet
items.description: Forged from the remnants of a long-lost realm, the Shattered Voidstone Amulet resonates with an age-old energy. Within its fragmented obsidian essence, murmurs of forgotten lineages echo, offering potency to the intrepid wearer, yet veiled with perilous consequences.

items.name: Smart Bomb
items.description: A bomb that explodes and causes damage to all characters within its range when thrown or attacked. The explosion from this device is so large, the deployer may be caught in the blast if he or she is not careful. In Star Fox, this item will explode after a set time or can be set off immediately with a button press.
